title: Manage on farm composting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage on farm composting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Organise for composting

pcs.text: Confirm composting technology, recipe and method to be used for raw material available and farm needs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm composting technology, recipe and method to be used for raw material available and farm needs.
